city in and county seat of Wayne County, and largest city in State of Michigan, United States
description_wiki: Detroit (  dih-TROYT, locally also  DEE-troyt) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Michigan.

description: park in the United States of America

aliases: The International Union, United Automobile, Aerospace and Agricultural Implement Workers of America
description_wiki: The United Auto Workers (UAW), fully named International Union, United Automobile, Aerospace and Agricultural Implement Workers of America, is an American labor union that represents workers in the United States (including Puerto Rico) and southern Ontario, Canada.

Clara Stanton Jones (May 14, 1913 – September 30, 2012) was the first African-American president of the American Library Association, serving as its acting president from April 11 to July 22, 1976, and then its president from July 22, 1976, to 1977.

description: public library system of Detroit, Michigan, USA
description_wiki: The Detroit Public Library is the municipal public library system of the City of Detroit in Michigan, United States.

description: American public research university located in Detroit, Michigan
description_wiki: Wayne State University (WSU) is a public research university in Detroit, Michigan, United States.

surface_forms: the height of the Vietnam War
description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

The National Lawyers Guild (NLG) is a progressive  public interest association of lawyers, law students, paralegals, jailhouse lawyers, law collective members, and other activist legal workers in the United States.

description: city in Wayne County, Michigan, United States
description_wiki: Hamtramck (  ham-TRAM-ik) is a city in Wayne County in the U.S. state of Michigan.
